channel.title: Docker on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Hart Hoover

item.title: Kubernetes 1.9 on a Raspberry Pi Cluster
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: First, this post (and my Raspberry Pi Kubernetes Cluster) stands on the shoulders of giants: work that’s already been done and explored by others. This post serves pretty much as a “here’s what I did so it worked for me” post based on their work.

item.title: Fixing a Broken Kubernetes API server
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: You’ve gone and done it: you oopsie-daisy’d some flag in your API server’s yaml, applied it, and now it’s in etcd. Your API server pods are crashlooping, and very quickly your dashboard and API go down. Nothing is accessible. You are screwed.

item.title: CI/CD with Kubernetes
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: I gave this talk at Kubernetes San Antonio on CI/CD options with Kubernetes. Check out manifests I used for Jenkins as a demo.
